&sql = "UPDATE [CategoriaImpostos] SET [CatCodNom]=T.[CatCodNom] FROM (SELECT [EmpCod], [CatCod], RTRIM(LTRIM(CONVERT( char(8), CAST([CatCod] AS decimal(8,0))))) + ' - ' + RTRIM(LTRIM([CatNom])) AS CatCodNom FROM [CategoriaImpostos]) T WHERE [CategoriaImpostos].EmpCod= T.EmpCod AND [CategoriaImpostos].CatCod= T.CatCod " Do 'RodaScript'

Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.23' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FucSmt') ALTER TABLE [Funcao] ADD [FucSmt] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FucCodNom') ALTER TABLE [Funcao] ADD [FucCodNom] varchar(80) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " UPDATE [Funcao] SET [FucCodNom]=T.[FucCodNom] FROM (SELECT [EmpCod], [FucCod], RTRIM(LTRIM(CONVERT( char(8), CAST([FucCod] AS decimal(8,0))))) + ' - ' + RTRIM(LTRIM([FucNom])) AS FucCodNom FROM [Funcao]) T WHERE [Funcao].EmpCod= T.EmpCod AND [Funcao].FucCod= T.FucCod " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE [Funcao] ALTER COLUMN [FucNom] varchar(80) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProDesEtq1') alter table produto add ProDesEtq1 varchar(100) null " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProDesEtq2') alter table produto add ProDesEtq2 varchar(100) null " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProDesEtq3') alter table produto add ProDesEtq3 varchar(100) null " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub

&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'MarCodNom') ALTER TABLE [Marca] ADD [MarCodNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " UPDATE [Marca] SET [MarCodNom] = T.[MarCodNom] FROM (SELECT [EmpCod], [MarCod], Rtrim(Ltrim(Convert(CHAR(8),Cast([MarCod] AS DECIMAL(8,0))))) + ' - ' + Rtrim(Ltrim(Coalesce([MarNom],''))) AS MarCodNom FROM [Marca]) T WHERE [Marca].EmpCod = T.EmpCod AND [Marca].MarCod = T.MarCod " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub

Sub 'RodaScript' if &IsWeb <> true msg(&sql, status) Endif
If &sql.IsEmpty() &sql = &Mensagem do 'Atualiza' Else do 'Atualiza' sql [!&sql!] EndIF commit &sql = ''
if &IsWeb <> true msg('EXE. SUCESSO', status) Endif EndSub
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId
If (ProgressValue = 0 or ProgressValue = 100 or ProgressValue.IsNull()) or &IsRetorna = false ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Else Return EndIF
When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
parm(in:&ProgressId, in:&EmpCmp, in:&IsWeb, in:&IsRetorna, in:&Progressini, in:&ProgressFin, in:&Percentual);
